---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Turbo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? (e.g. "I have too many extensions and I don't know which ones to disable")

### Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like Turbo to do.

### Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative solutions you've tried.

### Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
